name: Cron Context Injection
description: Inject isolated cron job output back into the target channel's persistent session context via enqueueSystemEvent.

include.description: Cron job name patterns to include (glob). Default: all cron jobs.

exclude.description: Cron job name patterns to exclude (glob). Default: none.

maxLength.description: Max characters to inject per cron output. Truncates if exceeded.

maxEventsPerSession.description: Max pending events per target session. Oldest events beyond this cap are skipped to prevent context overflow. Resets hourly.

prefix.description: Prefix added to injected system event text.
